## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor or cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI or infrastructure

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`.
- [ ] `pytest` passes.
- [ ] Shell scripts and systemd units use LF line endings, not CRLF.
- [ ] I bumped `VERSION` in `app/webui.py` if this is a release.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] I updated the docs (`docs/`) and `config.yaml.example` for any new setting.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, backup passwords, or credentials.

<!-- Anything a reviewer should know: device testing done, screens affected, migration steps. -->
